source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An infinitely long solenoid passes through the circuit as shown. The magnetic field of the solenoid, directed into the plane of the page, is weakening which produces a constant emf of magnitude $\xi$ for a closed loop around the outside of the solenoid. Once equilibrium is established in this circuit, what is the voltage across the switch $S$?
extraction_notes: images 字段中是 PIL 图像对象的字符串表示，不是实际图片路径或 URL

issues: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL image object string representation rather than an actual image path or URL

image_dependency: Question explicitly says "as shown," so the circuit layout is needed
Solenoid/circuit geometry and the switch location are diagram-dependent
multi_step: Requires combining electromagnetic induction information (constant emf magnitude xi) with circuit analysis
Must reason about the post-equilibrium state and then determine the voltage across switch S
Likely needs multiple condition combinations from the diagram rather than direct lookup from text alone
verifiability: Answer is a concise symbolic short-text expression: 4/3 xi
Target quantity is well-defined: voltage across switch S once equilibrium is established
A derived numeric/symbolic circuit result is amenable to rule-based or expert verification

risk_flags: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL image object string representation rather than an actual image path or URL

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像均存在，核心语义资产完整
样本可验证性强，答案为明确的短文本符号结果 `4/3 xi`
